prompt: A crumbling colonial stone wall with lush tropical vegetation — vines, broad green leaves, and a single bright orange flower — aggressively growing through cracks and over the top. Sun-bleached pale yellow wall against vivid jungle green. Harsh midday tropical light with sharp shadows. Nature reclaiming architecture. The one orange flower is a surreal accent against the green. 16:9, photorealistic.
